generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel with 30 years of service, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. The data is clear: nations that rely solely on themselves face far greater risks. Our partnerships aren't just about sharing burdens - they're about sharing intelligence, technology, and rapid response capabilities that no single nation can match. In today's uncertain world, this isn't just good policy - it's basic security. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrength
